task: Pick up a bag of things
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A clear plastic bag with a yellow item inside sits on a wooden table. The bag is flexible and contains a single visible object. STRATEGY - Reach the bag, grasp it by its body to lift, transport it to a new location, and place it down. Failure modes include dropping the bag during transport or placing it on an unstable surface. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bag body; Step 2 grasp the bag body for secure hold; Step 3 transport the bag to a destination; Step 4 place the bag on a stable surface.
Goal: placed(bag, surface); stable(bag)
Scene: bag, table
Step 1: reach(bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the clear plastic bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, bag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the clear plastic bag
  contact: holding(bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(bag)
Step 3: transport(bag -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  spatial: above(bag, table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(bag)
  done_when: above(bag, table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(bag -> table)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the table
  contact: surface_contact(bag, table) [completion]; released(bag) [completion]
  pose: stable(bag) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(bag, table) AND released(bag)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the clear plastic bag
the body of the clear plastic bag
an empty area on the table
an empty area on the table
